EXEC-01.evidence: Handoff zip opened and required root files were present.

EXEC-02.evidence: Package extracted to fixed local drive with app and docs folders.

EXEC-03.evidence: Operator reviewed pilot start and handoff scope.

EXEC-05.evidence: Node runtime manifest or node -v showed Node 22.5+.

EXEC-06.evidence: Desktop launched and showed setup or Today, not a blank panel.

EXEC-07.evidence: SmartScreen or antivirus handling documented by IT.

EXEC-08.evidence: First-run setup completed with disposable copied clinic data.

EXEC-10.evidence: Local copy status showed successful import metadata.

EXEC-11.evidence: Read-only QA loaded Today, Patients, Schedule, and Settings.

EXEC-12.evidence: Sandbox write workflows produced operation IDs for appointment status update, appointment time move, appointment creation, and patient demographics update.

EXEC-13.evidence: Backup artifacts existed before writes and restore succeeded.

EXEC-14.evidence: App restart kept clinic service online and config paths unchanged.

EXEC-15.evidence: Cold reboot skipped by IT for this day-0 run.

EXEC-16.evidence: PHI-safe result form and issue summary filed.
